About Me

Hi, I'm Sultan.

I'm a WordPress developer based in Lahore, Pakistan, building websites and online stores for clients across Pakistan and abroad. My focus is simple: a site should load fast, look sharp on every screen, and make it easy for a visitor to become a customer.

I work hands-on, from the first wireframe to the final launch — clean, semantic code, no unnecessary plugins, and pages that are built to rank well on Google as well as convert.

How I Work

What I Work With

WordPress website builds, custom WooCommerce stores, page speed and SEO optimization, and brand assets designed in Canva and Figma.

Services
←——

What I Can Build For You

——→

Website Development

Custom WordPress websites with clean code, responsive design for every device, and pages tuned for fast load times and search visibility.

WooCommerce Stores

Online stores built for an easy checkout — secure product pages, smooth cart flow, and a backend that's simple for you to manage day to day.

Brand & UI Design

Logos, social templates, and on-brand layouts that keep your website and your marketing looking like they belong to the same business.

How I Work
←——

From First Call to Launch

——→
STEP 01

Discovery Call

We talk about your business, your goals, and what the website needs to do for you. No jargon, just a clear plan.

STEP 02

Design & Plan

I map out the layout, pages, and look of the site, and share it with you before any code is written.

STEP 03

Build & Test

I develop the site, test it on real phones and browsers, and tune it for speed and search engines.

STEP 04

Launch & Support

Your site goes live, I walk you through how to manage it, and I stay available if you need help after launch.

Recent Work
←——

Projects I've Shipped

——→

Artec Architecture

A minimal, professional website for an architecture firm, built around clear project galleries and a fast-loading, mobile-friendly layout.

Amity Pet Care

A WooCommerce store for a pet care brand, with an appointment booking shortcut, product showcase sliders, and a streamlined checkout.

AllFresh Grocery

A grocery delivery website with category filters, a fast product search, and a secure cart built to handle daily order volume.

Common Questions
←——

Frequently Asked Questions

——→

Most websites take 1–3 weeks depending on the number of pages and features. WooCommerce stores usually take a bit longer. I'll give you a clear timeline after our first call.

I can guide you in choosing and setting up hosting and a domain, or work with hosting you already have. These are billed separately from the website build itself.

Design, development, mobile responsiveness, basic on-page SEO setup, and one round of revisions after the first draft. Anything beyond that is scoped separately.

Yes. Sites are built on WordPress, which is easy to edit yourself. I include a short walkthrough so you're comfortable making text and image updates after launch.

Typically 50% upfront to begin work and 50% on completion before launch. For larger projects, payment can be split into milestones — we'll agree on this before starting.
